category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Japan market access and Top Runner minimum energy performance requirements.

title.en: China-to-Japan Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入日本：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入日本：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Japan Top Runner Program energy efficiency (Act on Rationalizing Energy Use), JIS C 4034 safety and performance, and Radio Law EMC requirements for three-phase induction motors.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与日本领跑者计划能效（节能法）、JIS C 4034 安全与性能及电波法 EMC 要求差距对照，适用于三相感应电机。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與日本領跑者計畫能效（節能法）、JIS C 4034 安全與性能及電波法 EMC 要求差距對照，適用於三相感應電機。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Top Runner conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Japan Top Runner Program (Act on Rationalizing Energy Use), Radio Law, Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act, customs, and national market-surveillance requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、领跑者合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行日本领跑者计划（节能法）、电波法、电气用品安全法、海关及市场监管要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、領跑者合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行日本領跑者計畫（節能法）、電波法、電氣用品安全法、海關及市場監管要求。

answer_first.en: Japan's Top Runner Program mandates IE3-equivalent minimum efficiency for 3-phase induction motors (0.75–375 kW) under the Act on Rationalizing Energy Use; Chinese motors meeting GB 18613-2020 Grade 3 (IE3) are technically close but Japan-specific reporting obligations, JIS C 4034 performance documentation, and Radio Law EMC compliance for variable-speed-drive applications create additional gaps.
answer_first.zh: 日本领跑者计划依据《节能法》要求三相感应电机（0.75–375 kW）达到 IE3 等效最低能效；符合 GB 18613-2020 3 级（IE3）的中国电机在技术上接近该要求，但日本特有的报告义务、JIS C 4034 性能文件及变频驱动应用的电波法 EMC 合规构成额外差距。
answer_first.zht: 日本領跑者計畫依據《節能法》要求三相感應電機（0.75–375 kW）達到 IE3 等效最低能效；符合 GB 18613-2020 3 級（IE3）的中國電機在技術上接近該要求，但日本特有的申報義務、JIS C 4034 性能文件及變頻驅動應用的電波法 EMC 合規構成額外差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, market-surveillance, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
